description_long: This is a solid-body electric guitar with a single cutaway design, featuring a glossy black finish on the body and a natural wood-colored neck. The body is adorned with a subtle skull graphic, giving it a distinctive and edgy appearance. The guitar has six metallic strings, two visible pickups, and a set of control knobs for volume and tone adjustment. The headstock is angled and fitted with six tuning pegs arranged in a single row, typical of many modern electric guitars. The bridge and hardware are metallic, contrasting with the dark body. The overall construction suggests a robust instrument suitable for urban music scenes, such as street performances or garage bands.
description: A glossy black, single-cutaway electric guitar with a skull graphic, metallic hardware, and a natural wood neck. It features six strings, two pickups, and a modern headstock with six tuning pegs.
description_view_0: The front view shows the black body with a skull graphic, six strings, two pickups, and control knobs, along with the full length of the neck and headstock.
description_view_1: The side view highlights the guitar's slim profile, the thickness of the body, and the angled neck-to-body joint.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the glossy black back of the body, the continuation of the skull graphic, and the back of the neck and headstock.
description_view_3: The opposite side view shows the edge of the body, the side of the neck, and the tuning pegs from a different angle.
attribute_headstock_design: Angled headstock with six inline tuning pegs, no visible logo, and a simple contour
